description_long: This is a medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight, upright trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves. The trunk is grayish-brown and relatively slender, tapering slightly as it rises. Branches emerge at various heights, spreading outward in an alternate pattern, giving the tree a natural, asymmetrical silhouette. The foliage is distributed throughout the canopy, with visible gaps between clusters of leaves, allowing some light to pass through. The leaves are simple and broad, typical of many urban street or park trees. No roots are visible above the ground, and the tree appears healthy and well-suited for urban landscaping.
description: A medium-sized deciduous tree with a straight trunk and a moderately dense canopy of green, broad leaves. The branches spread outward in an alternate pattern, creating a natural, airy silhouette.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from the front, showing a straight trunk and a balanced spread of branches with green leaves, with some gaps in the canopy.
description_view_1: This view highlights the leftward spread of the lower branches and the slightly denser foliage on the left side.
description_view_2: The tree appears with a more pronounced rightward branch extension, and the canopy shows more visible gaps between leaf clusters.
description_view_3: The trunk is centered, and the branches are evenly distributed, with the foliage appearing slightly denser on the right side.
